ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "login_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login attempt */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user attempting to login */,
  "round_trip_time_ms" REAL /* Round-trip time of the login attempt in milliseconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user attempting to login */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "asn" INTEGER /* Autonomous System Number associated with the IP */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Name and version of the browser */,
  "os" TEXT /* Name and version of the operating system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "login_successful" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the login was successful */,
  "is_attack_ip" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the IP is flagged as an attack source */,
  "is_account_takeover" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the login is suspected of being an account takeover */,
  "geo_longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the user's location */,
  "geo_latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the user's location */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score associated with the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_blacklist" (
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address that has been flagged */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the IP address */,
  "date_flagged" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was flagged */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the IP address flag (e.g., internal monitoring, external feed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "login_id" INTEGER /* ID of the login attempt that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., suspicious login, account takeover) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert generation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., pending, resolved, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_alerts_login_id FOREIGN KEY ("login_id") REFERENCES user_logins ("login_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID associated with the session */,
  "login_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was initiated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used in the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID attempting to login */,
  "attempt_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login attempt */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user attempting to login */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the login attempt was successful */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for login failure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_info" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID associated with the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser used */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "device_fingerprint" TEXT /* Unique fingerprint of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_info_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID associated with the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, password change) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "actor" TEXT /* Actor who performed the action (e.g., user, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "total_logins" INTEGER /* Total number of login attempts */,
  "successful_logins" INTEGER /* Total number of successful logins */,
  "failed_logins" INTEGER /* Total number of failed logins */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for logins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID associated with the preference */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the notification is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting record */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration record */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., SSO, API) */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration for the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_geolocation" (
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address */,
  "geo_longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the IP address */,
  "geo_latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the IP address */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the IP address */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the IP address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address")
)
